assertions.description: All copper, mask, paste, silkscreen, edge cuts, and inner plane layers found. No missing required or recommended layers. PTH drill file present (186 holes matching 168 vias + ~18 THT pads). B.Paste height=0.0 is not a bug — back paste has only 2 flashes at same Y coordinate. Generated by KiCad 5.0.0.
assertions.aspirational_reason: auto-generated check path incorrect for PCB/gerber output

assertions.description: B.SilkS and F.SilkS both report min_feature_mm=0.01. Standard silkscreen line widths are 0.1-0.2mm. The 0.01mm value suggests the aperture analysis is picking up a text stroke or region boundary rather than a drawn silkscreen line. This could indicate a parsing artifact in the aperture size extraction for silkscreen layers.
